title: Daoist Canon: Yunji Qiqian (Cloudy Bookcase Selections) (Section 6)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Yunji Qiqian (Cloudy Bookcase Selections)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Yunji Qiqian (Cloudy Bookcase Selections)

translation.text: From the Yunji Qiqian (Cloudy Bookcase Selections) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
